headerDisplay: Detect who's home by scanning for BLE signals from phones. Each tracked person appears as an occupancy sensor.
footerDisplay: Enter the people you want to track. The plugin will scan for their phones via Bluetooth and update their presence automatically.

people.title: People to Track
people.description: Add each person you want to track. The plugin scans for their phone's Bluetooth signal.

bleName.title: Phone Bluetooth Name
bleName.description: The name your phone advertises via Bluetooth (check Bluetooth settings).

bleAddress.title: BLE Address (MAC)
bleAddress.description: Optional. BLE MAC address. Less reliable on iOS due to address randomization.

scanInterval.title: Scan Interval
scanInterval.description: How often to scan for phones.

scanDuration.title: Scan Duration (seconds)
scanDuration.description: How long each BLE scan lasts. Longer = more devices found.

rssiThreshold.title: Signal Threshold (dBm)
rssiThreshold.description: Signal strength cutoff. Devices weaker than this are considered 'away'. -70 works for most homes.

awayDelay.title: Away Delay (seconds)
awayDelay.description: How long a phone must be undetectable before marking 'away'. Prevents flapping.
